completed_tasks.name: Thread/persistence foundation and Wave 0 test scaffolds
Durable thread schema and thread-aware contracts/endpoints
Explicit fact memory and clarification policy
Grounded final scenario composition and serialization lock
Live API verification from merged main branch
completed_tasks.progress: Wave 3 is merged to main, pgvector Postgres container is running, but live API verification is incomplete because local app startup was blocked by env-loading issues, bash/WSL Java toolchain mismatch, and repeated Gradle/bootstrap launch problems.

remaining_tasks.name: Boot merged main branch application locally with env loaded and alternate port
Update Phase 3 planning/state artifacts after successful verification

blockers.description: Live API verification has not completed. The merged app still needs a clean local boot path from main with env variables loaded correctly.
blockers.workaround: Use Windows gradlew.bat from the main repo with JAVA_HOME pointed at Temurin 25 and env variables parsed from .env instead of using bash/WSL startup paths.

blockers.description: .env contains an extra invalid trailing line ('to'), which breaks plain shell sourcing.
blockers.workaround: Parse only valid KEY=value lines or remove the stray line before sourcing.

decisions.decision: Merged Phase 3 Wave 3 onto main before finishing live verification.
decisions.rationale: User explicitly asked to merge to main to run there instead of continuing from the worktree.

decisions.decision: Use pgvector/pgvector:pg16 for local verification database.
decisions.rationale: Liquibase requires the vector extension; plain postgres:16 failed during startup.
The worktree had no .env, so repo-root env had to be parsed explicitly for OpenAI and DB settings.

next_action: Start the merged main app with Windows gradlew.bat, JAVA_HOME set to C:/Users/admin/.jdks/temurin-25.0.2, env variables parsed from D:/ai/traffic-law-chatbot/.env, then run POST /api/v1/chat/threads and POST /api/v1/chat/threads/{threadId}/messages on an alternate port to complete the CLARIFICATION_NEEDED -> FINAL_ANALYSIS verification.
context_notes: Phase 3 code is on main through fb90fc5. The remaining work is operational verification, not implementation. Keep the focus narrow: boot app, hit APIs, confirm threadId reuse, responseMode transitions, pendingFacts presence, final scenarioAnalysis structure, citations/sources, and cautious Vietnamese tone.
